response.justification: Candidate lacks critical required qualifications: native-level Japanese proficiency is completely absent, C programming expertise is minimal, and there is no demonstrated background in embedded networking, network security, or security technologies like MACsec, 802.1X, or device tamper detection. While the candidate shows strong general software engineering skills across multiple technology stacks, their experience is concentrated in web, mobile, and full-stack development rather than embedded systems security.
strengths: 15+ years of diverse software engineering experience demonstrating ability to master complex systems and new technology stacks
Proven software craftsmanship practices with TDD, CI/CD, and collaborative development experience
Some embedded systems and low-level programming background with C, C++, and D language projects
concerns: No Japanese language proficiency listed (English, Romanian, German only) — this is a required qualification
Minimal C programming experience; career heavily weighted toward TypeScript, JavaScript, and web technologies rather than embedded UNIX development
No background in embedded networking, network security, or security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, encryption, authentication systems)

key_factors.factor: C proficiency and embedded systems expertise
Network security and embedded networking domain knowledge
